tweets.full_text:
OpenAI reveals Codex Micro (their first hardware product, so to say)

OpenAI’s $230 Codex Micro is a compact control deck for agentic coding, with RGB status keys, shortcuts for common Codex actions, and a dial for adjusting reasoning effort. 

Built with Work Louder, it works on https://t.co/DtD43n7Scb
tweets.summary: OpenAI推出首款硬件产品Codex Micro，售价$230，是一款RGB控制面板，配有快捷键和推理调节旋钮，与Work Louder合作开发。
angles: OpenAI终于出硬件了，$230控制面板首曝

tweets.full_text:
Elon Musk says that @SpaceX has decided to increase the peak power of its upcoming AI satellite (called AI1) by 67% to ~250kW (up from 150kW), and its average power by 33% to 160kW (up from 120kW).

This will be enough to handle an Nvidia Rubin NVL72 rack, which contains 72 Rubin https://t.co/OHORQ8LmEr
tweets.summary: SpaceX决定将AI1卫星的峰值功率提升67%至250kW（从150kW），平均功率提升33%至160kW，足以支持Nvidia Rubin NVL72机架（72块GPU）。
angles: SpaceX AI卫星功率暴增67%，能装72块GPU

tweets.full_text:
On file deletions. We’ve investigated a handful of reports where GPT-5.6 unexpectedly deleted files. 

What we have  found is that this most commonly occurs when:
- Full access mode is enabled and codex is run without sandboxing protections, including without auto review being
tweets.summary: GPT-5.6文件删除问题调查：全访问模式+无沙箱保护+无自动审查时最易发生。
angles: GPT-5.6文件删除bug：全访问模式的隐患
沙箱保护缺失导致数据丢失，安全配置有多重要
Codex安全性警示：自动审查为何不能少
